title: geum sylvaticum subsp. inclinatum
intro: Geum sylvaticum subsp. inclinatum, also known as the alpine avens, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the Rosaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic actions. The health benefits of Geum sylvaticum subsp. inclinatum are attributed to its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Geum sylvaticum subsp. inclinatum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
